summary: Well-structured test suite with good separation of concerns (unit/structure/e2e), but critical gaps reduce confidence. Unit tests cover the main three policies (maxAgeDays, keepLatestPerWorkflow, maxTotalSize) and dry-run mode adequately, with some boundary condition testing. However, edge cases are missing: zero maxTotalSize, identical artifact timestamps, extreme values. The sophisticated e2e harness (Test-Workflow.ps1) is well-designed for running tests through act, but only tests the happy path—no error scenarios. Fixture files (case1-age.json, case2-combined.json, case3-keeplatest-dryrun.json) are referenced but not provided in this submission, making it impossible to validate the actual test data comprehensiveness or expected values. The ASSERT parsing regex (ASSERT\s+(\w+)=(.+)$) is simplistic and fragile. Workflow structure tests verify presence and basic YAML syntax, but don't validate permissions or complete job definitions. Missing: tests for JSON output format, fixture validation before act runs, error-case e2e paths, combined policy interactions in one scenario. Would work if fixtures are comprehensive, but depends on unseen data.
